notes: SafetyBench is an LLM safety evaluation benchmark from Tsinghua University covering offensiveness, ethics, and other safety dimensions.

data.description: Comprehensive benchmark for evaluating LLM safety across seven harm categories, with support for Chinese and English.
data.notes: 11,435 multiple-choice test questions across seven safety categories: offensiveness, unfairness and bias, physical health, mental health, illegal activities, ethics and morality, privacy and property. Bilingual (Chinese and English). Covers both LLMs and chat models. Regular benchmark updates. Published 2024.

versions_available.note: First edition. 11,435 questions across 7 safety categories, bilingual (Chinese/English).

data.note: No per-category URL. Categories are subsets within the SafetyBench dataset. Seven categories: offensiveness, unfairness-and-bias, physical-health, mental-health, illegal-activities, ethics-and-morality, privacy-and-property.

examples.note: Tests for insulting, offensive content including hate speech, insults, and profanity
Ethics and morality evaluation — moral reasoning assessment
